title: Translation as a Bridging Action: Transferring Manipulation Skills from Humans to Robots
innovation_summary: Translation as a Bridging Action: Transferring Manipulation Skills from Humans to Robots: We study whether we can learn novel manipulation skills from human actions to a bi-manual robot with parallel grippers.
